campaign.name: BLKOUT Evergreen Content Calendar 2026
campaign.tagline: Year-round content celebrating Black queer joy, heritage, and community power.
campaign.mission: Maintain a consistent content presence across platforms with heritage dates, community spotlights, governance updates, and AIvor-produced content. Recurring weekly slots ensure a steady pipeline of engaging, values-driven posts.
campaign.voice: IVOR Cummings — Warm, empowering, community-centred. Balances celebration with advocacy.

phases.name: March 2026 — Women's History & Trans Visibility
phases.theme: Centering Black trans women, intersectional feminism, and community care

content.title: March Newsletter: Women's History & Trans Visibility
content.content: Monthly newsletter covering Women's History Month, upcoming Trans Day of Visibility events, community updates, and BLKOUT governance news.

content.title: International Women's Day — Black Trans Women Who Changed the World
content.content: Carousel celebrating Black trans women pioneers: Marsha P. Johnson, Miss Major Griffin-Gracy, Janet Mock, Laverne Cox. Each slide features a quote and key contribution.

content.title: IWD Cross-post — Twitter Thread
content.content: Thread version of IWD carousel for Twitter/X audience. Key stats on Black trans women in leadership.

content.title: Community Spotlight: Member Feature #1
content.content: Monthly community spotlight — interview-style post featuring a BLKOUT community member. Quote card format with photo (with consent).

content.title: Governance Update: CBS Q1 Report
content.content: Quarterly governance update for LinkedIn. CBS membership numbers, board activities, financial transparency summary. Professional tone.

content.title: AIvor Says: Weekly Wisdom #1
content.content: AI-generated quote card from AIvor. Weekly series sharing wisdom, affirmations, or historical facts relevant to Black queer communities.

content.title: Trans Day of Visibility — Heritage Post
content.content: Carousel celebrating Trans Day of Visibility. Focus on Black trans joy and resilience. Feature verified UK organisations: Gendered Intelligence, CliniQ, BLKOUT's own trans members (with consent).

content.title: TDOV LinkedIn — Allyship in Action
content.content: Professional allyship post for Trans Day of Visibility. How organisations can support trans colleagues and communities. Link to resources.

phases.name: April 2026 — Daisy Nook Gathering & Community Building
phases.theme: Spring renewal, community gatherings, and relationship building

content.title: April Newsletter: Spring Events & Community Updates
content.content: Monthly newsletter: spring events roundup, Daisy Nook Gathering preview, community spotlight, AIvor updates.

content.title: Community Spotlight: Member Feature #2
content.content: Monthly community spotlight — second in the series. Member interview quote card.

content.title: Stephen Lawrence Day — Heritage Post
content.content: Stephen Lawrence Day remembrance. Reflection on racial justice progress in the UK, link to Stephen Lawrence Trust. Cross-posted to all platforms.

content.title: AIvor Says: Weekly Wisdom #5
content.content: AI-generated wisdom card. Theme: resilience and spring renewal.

content.title: AIvor Says: Weekly Wisdom #6
content.content: AI-generated wisdom card. Theme: community power and collective care.

content.title: Governance Update: Board Minutes Summary
content.content: Monthly board update — summary of key decisions, upcoming votes, CBS member participation opportunities.

content.title: Daisy Nook Gathering — Save the Date
content.content: Daisy Nook Gathering promotion — community picnic/walk in nature. Save the date graphic with event details.

phases.name: May 2026 — Mental Health & Pride Season Prep
phases.theme: Mental Health Awareness Month, Pride season preparation, community wellbeing

content.title: May Newsletter: Mental Health & Pride Prep
content.content: Monthly newsletter: Mental Health Awareness Month, BMHWA partnership, Pride season preview, community spotlight.

content.title: Mental Health Awareness Week — Black Queer Mental Health
content.content: Carousel series on Black queer mental health. Statistics, resources, self-care tips. Feature BMHWA Assess & Align tool. Cross-reference with Queer Britain resources.

content.title: MHAW — Professional Resources Thread
content.content: Thread with professional mental health resources for Black queer men in the UK. Link to Assess & Align, Mind, Switchboard, Black Minds Matter.

content.title: Community Spotlight: Member Feature #3
content.content: Monthly community spotlight — third in the series. Focus on wellbeing and joy.

content.title: IDAHOBIT — International Day Against Homophobia, Biphobia & Transphobia
content.content: IDAHOBIT 2026 — sharing the realities of discrimination faced by Black LGBTQ+ communities in the UK and globally. Hope-centred messaging with action points.

content.title: AIvor Says: Weekly Wisdom #9
content.content: AI-generated wisdom card. Theme: mental health and self-compassion.

content.title: AIvor Says: Weekly Wisdom #10
content.content: AI-generated wisdom card. Theme: pride in identity.

content.title: Pride Season Announcement — Where to Find BLKOUT
content.content: Pride season announcement post: which Prides BLKOUT will attend, what to expect, how to get involved. UK Black Pride, London Pride, Manchester Pride dates.

content.title: Governance Update: AGM Preview
content.content: AGM preview for CBS members. Agenda highlights, how to submit motions, voting procedures.

phases.name: June 2026 — Pride Month
phases.theme: Pride Month celebrations, UK Black Pride, community visibility

content.title: June Newsletter: Pride Month Special
content.content: Special Pride Month newsletter: full event listings, BLKOUT at Pride, community stories, merchandise, volunteer opportunities.

content.title: Pride Month — 30 Days of Black Queer History
content.content: Launch of daily Black queer history series for Pride Month. Day 1: Bayard Rustin — the architect of the March on Washington.

content.title: AIvor Says: Pride Affirmations Series
content.content: Weekly AIvor pride affirmation cards. Celebrating Black queer identity with generated artwork and quotes.

content.title: Community Spotlight: Pride Feature
content.content: Special Pride Month community spotlight — what Pride means to BLKOUT members.

content.title: Windrush Day — Heritage Post
content.content: Windrush Day celebration. Honouring the Windrush generation and their contribution to Black British LGBTQ+ communities. Historical photos, quotes, community reflections.

content.title: Governance Update: Mid-Year Review
content.content: CBS mid-year governance review. Financial transparency, membership growth, impact metrics, board activities.
